text: Implement a dynamic importance scoring system based on recent user interactions and project milestones. This will prevent the replay of outdated or irrelevant memories, ensuring the agent focuses on the most critical tasks and updates.
reason: This improves the plan by ensuring the agent only retains and updates its most relevant knowledge, enhancing efficiency and accuracy in its subsequent iterations. It addresses the recent winError by mitigating the impact of forcibly closed connections by dynamically adjusting the importance score based on recent activity.
